title: Request Rate by Service and Endpoint
description: HTTP request throughput across CRM and Drone Shop grouped by route and status code. Identifies hotspots, traffic patterns, and potential DDoS indicators.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and msg = 'Request completed' | stats count as Requests, distinctcount('Trace ID') as UniqueTraces by 'Service Name', 'URI Path', 'Response Code' | sort -Requests

ask_ai_prompts: Highlight the busiest endpoints and call out any response-code patterns that look abnormal.
Explain whether traffic concentration suggests a hotspot, crawler activity, or brute-force behavior.
